_note: Slab c.1450-1080 BC — the ISRAELITE Conquest & Judges (SCRIPTURE, plain UPPERCASE ids; historical/biblical, NOT flagged legendary) and the GREEK aftermath of Troy: the Heracleidae / Dorian Return (MYC_ ids; wholly LEGENDARY, each such node flagged). Two independent threads, most families standalone (as the brief allows — the Judges need not interconnect). THREAD A — ISRAEL. (1) Aaron's priestly line, extending the existing house: AARON (existing) already has son ELEAZARA (Eleazar, the third High Priest, existing); this slab adds PHINEHAS (the zealous priest, Numbers 25) as ELEAZARA's son, then the high-priestly succession of 1 Chronicles 6:4-8 / Ezra 7:4-5 — PHINEHAS > ABISHUA > BUKKI > UZZI. (2) The Conquest generation, standalone (their fathers Nun & Jephunneh are new leaf nodes, not otherwise in the tree): JOSHUA_NUN — Joshua son of Nun, the Ephraimite, Moses's successor who led the conquest (created DISTINCT from the unrelated LK_JOSHUA_13 in Luke's list, per the brief); and CALEB son of Jephunneh the Kenizzite, the faithful spy (Numbers 13-14, Joshua 14). (3) The major JUDGES of the Book of Judges (~1200-1050 BC; each flagged '· judge'), each attached to its scripturally-named father as a standalone family since none of those fathers already sit in the tree and directly hanging a judge off a 13th-15th-century patriarch would be centuries off — so they stand as flagged tribal figures with tribe noted: OTHNIEL son of Kenaz (kinsman of Caleb; Judah/Kenizzite; Judges 3:9-11); EHUD son of Gera the Benjamite, the left-handed slayer of Eglon of Moab (Judges 3:15-30); SHAMGAR son of Anath, who struck 600 Philistines with an oxgoad (Judges 3:31); DEBORAH the prophetess (wife of Lappidoth, drawn as a childless union) with BARAK son of Abinoam of Naphtali, who together broke Sisera (Judges 4-5); GIDEON (Jerubbaal) son of Joash the Abiezrite of Manasseh, who had many wives and seventy sons — his firstborn JETHER (Judges 8:20) shown, and ABIMELECH, his son by a Shechemite concubine, who killed his brothers and made himself king (Judges 8:30-9:57); JEPHTHAH the Gileadite (son of Gilead by a harlot) and his unnamed DAUGHTER, whom his rash vow doomed (Judges 11); and SAMSON son of Manoah, the Danite Nazirite strongman, with DELILAH drawn as a childless union (Judges 13-16). THREAD B — GREECE, the HERACLEIDAE & the Dorian Return (all MYC_, all LEGENDARY, dates nominal placeholders): Heracles (existing MYC_HERACLES) x Deianira > HYLLUS (eldest of the sons by Deianira) > CLEODAEUS > ARISTOMACHUS > the three brothers TEMENUS, CRESPHONTES & ARISTODEMUS, sons of Aristomachus, who led the 'Return of the Heraclidae' (the Dorian invasion, traditionally ~1100 BC, the prophesied 'third generation') and divided the Peloponnese: Argos to Temenus, Messenia to Cresphontes, and Lacedaemon (Sparta) to the twin sons of Aristodemus by Argia — EURYSTHENES & PROCLES, founders of Sparta's dual (Agiad & Eurypontid) kingship. This line runs on toward the historical Spartan kings and, through Temenus's Argead branch, is claimed as the ancestry of the Macedonian kings (Philip II & Alexander) — noted for a future slab. Intermediate consorts of Hyllus/Cleodaeus/Aristomachus are unnamed in the sources and drawn as flagged 'consort (unnamed)' nodes rather than invented. TROJAN AFTERMATH (note only, no new nodes): Orestes (existing MYC_ORESTES, son of Agamemnon) succeeded at Mycenae/Argos after the war, and Aeneas (existing TRO_AENEAS) sailed west — his line to the Alban kings and Rome is left for the ANTIQUITY/Rome slab. Web-verified against Wikipedia 'Heracleidae', 'Temenus', 'Cresphontes', 'Aristodemus (son of Aristomachus)', 'Eurysthenes', 'Procles', and against the biblical text (Numbers 13-14 & 25, Joshua, Judges 3-16, 1 Chronicles 6, Ezra 7). No fabrication — scripture followed for Israel, received mythology for Greece; unattested spouses flagged rather than invented.

families.note: ISRAEL — Aaron's priestly line. ELEAZARA (existing: Eleazar, son of Aaron, the third High Priest) to PHINEHAS, the zealous priest of Numbers 25 who turned away God's wrath and received the covenant of a perpetual priesthood.

children.label:
Phinehas

children.label:
Abishua

families.note: ISRAEL — the Conquest generation (standalone; Nun is a new leaf). JOSHUA_NUN — Joshua son of Nun, the Ephraimite, Moses's successor who led Israel into Canaan. Created DISTINCT from the unrelated LK_JOSHUA_13 of Luke's genealogy.

families.note: ISRAEL — the JUDGES. DEBORAH the prophetess & judge, wife of Lappidoth, drawn as a childless union (the text names no children). Deborah led Israel with Barak; the two are shown separately (Barak below), as they were fellow-leaders, not spouses.

children.label:
Barak

families.note: ISRAEL — the JUDGES. GIDEON (Jerubbaal) son of Joash the Abiezrite of Manasseh; the judge who routed Midian with 300 men. Standalone under his father Joash.

families.note: ISRAEL — GIDEON x his Shechemite concubine: Abimelech, who murdered his seventy brothers on one stone and had himself made king at Shechem — Israel's first would-be monarch, killed by a millstone at Thebez.

children.label:

families.note: ISRAEL — JEPHTHAH x his wife: his only child, an unnamed daughter, whom his vow doomed; she bewailed her virginity two months and became a yearly lament of Israel's daughters.

families.note: ISRAEL — SAMSON ● Delilah, the Philistine woman of Sorek who coaxed the secret of his strength from him and betrayed him. Drawn as a childless union (they had no issue).

families.note: GREECE — the HERACLEIDAE (LEGENDARY). Heracles (existing MYC_HERACLES) x Deianira > Hyllus, eldest of Heracles's sons by Deianira and ancestor of the royal Heraclid line.

children.label:
👑 Hyllus

families.note: GREECE — the HERACLEIDAE (LEGENDARY). Aristomachus to his three sons — Temenus, Cresphontes & Aristodemus — who led the successful Return of the Heraclidae (the Dorian invasion, traditionally ~1100 BC, the prophesied 'third generation') and divided the Peloponnese: Argos to Temenus, Messenia to Cresphontes, Lacedaemon to Aristodemus's line. Consort unnamed in the sources, flagged.

b.label:
consort of Aristomachus
c.1158 BC · unnamed in the sources; mother of Temenus, Cresphontes & Aristodemus · LEGENDARY

children.label:
👑 Temenus
c.1120 BC · son of Aristomachus; led the Dorian Return & took Argos; his Argead line was later claimed as ancestor of the Macedonian kings (Philip II & Alexander) · LEGENDARY

👑 Cresphontes
c.1118 BC · son of Aristomachus; took Messenia in the division of the Peloponnese; later slain with two of his sons in a revolt · LEGENDARY

👑 Aristodemus
c.1116 BC · son of Aristomachus; his twin sons Eurysthenes & Procles received Lacedaemon (Sparta), founding its dual kingship · LEGENDARY

families.note: GREECE — the HERACLEIDAE (LEGENDARY). Aristodemus x Argia > the twins Eurysthenes & Procles, from whom descend the two royal houses of Sparta (the Agiad & Eurypontid lines) — the bridge from legend toward the historical Spartan kings.

b.label:
Argia
c.1114 BC · daughter of Autesion; wife of Aristodemus; mother of the twin Spartan founder-kings Eurysthenes & Procles · LEGENDARY

children.label:
👑 Eurysthenes
c.1090 BC · twin son of Aristodemus; founder of the Agiad royal house of Sparta · LEGENDARY

👑 Procles
c.1090 BC · twin son of Aristodemus; founder of the Eurypontid royal house of Sparta · LEGENDARY
